stop_conditions: an unreviewed runtime dependency is required
package proof skips a required check
active_workunit.title: Replace the TUI scaffold with a functional client

architecture_invariants: R3.5 is the architecture endpoint; this wave must deliver product value without another broad redesign.
Universal Setup owns installed-state mutation and Universal Launcher owns product-neutral orchestration.
Frontends consume generated command law and contain no Factorio backend behavior.
AIDE makes no provider, model or network call.
Human Factorio gates remain explicit operator decisions and cannot be inferred from automated proof.
open_blockers: H1 real Factorio isolation has no reviewed operator verdict; this blocks only H1-H3.
Release, signing, publication and Safe beta promotion are outside this wave.
